Author:     Jan Beich <jbeich@FreeBSD.org>

    net/mpich: enable L0 by default for GPU support

    To disable at runtime set MPIR_CVAR_ENABLE_GPU=0 via environ(7).

    PR:             256244
    Tested by:      thierry
